exact_quote: 4 Easiest runs, 6 More Difficult runs, 2 Most Difficult runs
notes: Official Three Rivers Parks page lists 12 ski runs: 4 easiest (33%), 6 more difficult (50%), 2 most difficult (17%). No expert tier.

exact_quote: 17 Easy, 6 Low Intermediate, 7 Intermediate, 6 High Intermediate, 6 Black Diamond (Advanced), 3 Double Black Diamond (Extremely difficult)
notes: Official mountain-info page. Mapped: Easy=beginner (17/45=38%), Low+Mid+High Intermediate = intermediate (19/45=42%), Black Diamond = advanced (6/45=13%), Double Black = expert (3/45=7%).
Official trail-map page. 3-tier breakdown, sums to 100%. No expert tier published.

exact_quote: beginner, intermediate, and advanced trails as well as three terrain parks

exact_quote: 30 kilometers of scenic trails ideal for mountain biking and hiking in the summer
notes: LOGE Glacier is a lodging operation near Glacier NP, not a ski resort. The 30km figure is summer hiking/biking trails. No alpine ski trail data.

notes: Official homepage confirms 59 trails. /trails-and-glades and /mountain-stats sub-paths return 404. No explicit difficulty percentage breakdown found in available pages.
